decisions.rationale: Bubble bTHxu reads option-set .index fields on the User type, while readQuestionScores consumes pre-derived numeric sq1..sq5 from stabilityScores/alignmentScores/performanceScores nested maps or flat *_number keys in profiles.onboarding_data JSONB. Brownfield AUTH-04 onboarding steps already compute and persist numeric scores during the wizard (OnboardingStability/Alignment/Performance delegate to computePillarScore), so calculators receive equivalent inputs without re-resolving option slugs at API-01 time. criteria_audit AC-2 and FV-2 pass; API-02-user-classification depends_on gate needs patched *_score_number fields, not UDS option-set index resolution. Optional JSONB contract documentation in pillarScoreUserData.ts is polish — defer to a later doc pass or AUTH-04 consumer wave if literal UDS field parity is required.

Preflight reuse_decision: new is imprecise coverage metadata, not an implementation defect. Prototype already computed pillar scores inline in onboarding step components and completeOnboarding.ts; API-01 correctly extracted shared aggregatePillarScore/calculateUser* modules and wired runPillarScoreCalculators into onboardingProfilePipeline. All ACs pass (coverage 100%, criteria_audit pass, functional_ok=true). Per triage AC-quality rules, preflight label correction is cycle-artifact polish — does not require rewrite.

No unit tests for computePillarScore NaN/rounding edge cases or readQuestionScores nested-vs-flat fallback. Testing is not in API-01 acceptance criteria; review priority is low. Functional audits FV-1/FV-2 pass with Bubble-grounded evidence. Add aggregatePillarScore.test.ts and pillarScoreUserData.test.ts in a dedicated test wave or alongside the next edit to userProfile calculators — does not block API-02 advance.

completeOnboarding invokes runOnboardingProfilePipeline, which calls runPillarScoreCalculators first (stability → alignment → performance) before API-02–API-05 steps — matching Bubble bTGNJ ScheduleAPIEvent full chain, not only the bTHVC/bTHja/bTHgY pillar segment. AC-3 requires exposing runPillarScoreCalculators callable from AUTH-05 completeOnboarding; it is exported and runs as the pipeline's first stage. Review alternative explicitly marks this acceptable for AUTH-05 end-to-end parity; downstream API items own their own calculator modules within the shared pipeline.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 2 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, all ACs pass, no blockers. Deferred: C-1 optional JSONB/UDS field-parity documentation (AUTH-04 owns onboarding persistence contract); C-3 unit tests for aggregatePillarScore and pillarScoreUserData (out of API-01 AC scope). Accepted: C-2 preflight reuse_decision metadata inaccuracy; C-4 full pipeline invocation is intentional AUTH-05/bTGNJ parity with pillar calculators running first.
